mlstm 0.1.6
  • Reference
    • Introduction to mlstm
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

eLDA_pass_b_fast()
One Gibbs sampling sweep for LDA (collapsed) using document–term list.
init_mod_from_count()
Initialize LDA/STM state from a (d, v, c) sparse count matrix.
run_lda_gibbs()
Collapsed LDA Gibbs sampling for sparse (d, v, c) triplet data.
run_mlstm_vi()
Multi-level supervised topic model (MLSTM) via variational inference.
run_stm_vi()
Supervised topic model (STM) variational inference with ELBO-based convergence.
set_threads()
Set threading options for STM/MLSTM computations
stm_multi_hier_vi_parallel()
Variational inference for multi-output supervised topic models with hierarchical prior.
stm_vi_parallel()
Variational inference for supervised LDA (single continuous response).

Developed by Tomoya Himeno.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
